backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a Jewellery Order Management System; defines Order, DesignMapping, and Karigar types with CRUD operations, order status transitions (Pending/Ready/Hallmark), and blob storage for design images and Excel files.
backend/migration.mo: Trivial migration module that passes state through unchanged; serves as a placeholder for future schema migrations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report file with an empty features array, indicating no features have been documented yet.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, used as build/planning reference for the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, sidebar, chart colors, etc.) using OKLCH-style values.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vite/React app; sets viewport meta, favicon, page title 'Jewellery Order Management System', and mounts the React root via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes, wraps the app in ThemeProvider (dark mode), QueryClientProvider, and a SidebarProvider layout with AppSidebar and a mobile header trigger.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Custom: Dashboard tab that displays CO-type Pending orders filtered by a search input matching order number, design code, or generic name, rendered via the reusable OrderTable component.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Design: Modal dialog for viewing a design's image with zoom and pan (mouse and touch) support, fetching the image blob via the useGetDesignImage hook and deriving a direct URL from it.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Hallma: Displays orders with Hallmark status, supporting grouped-by-design view, search/filter by karigar and order type, bulk status update to ReturnFromHallmark, and export to JPEG/PDF.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Kariga: Shows pending orders grouped by karigar name with summary stats (order count, quantity, weight, unique designs), and navigates to a karigar detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/OrderT: Renders a tabular list of orders with row selection, bulk mark-as-ready actions, delete support, and export options (Excel, PDF, JPEG) via a dropdown menu.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/ReadyT: Displays Ready-status orders grouped by design with search filtering, bulk mark-as-pending action, and export to JPEG or PDF.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Summar: Renders four summary metric cards (order count, weight, quantity, CO count) whose values are computed from all orders filtered to match the currently active dashboard tab.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Suppli: A dialog component that allows users to enter supplied quantities for RB orders, supporting partial supply where remaining units stay as Pending, and triggers a batch supply mutation on confirm.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/TotalO: A dashboard tab that displays pending orders grouped by design code with filtering, selection, and actions like delete, mark ready, and supply RB orders via a dialog.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Unmapp: An alert section that fetches and displays unmapped design codes (missing generic or karigar names), grouped by design, with navigation buttons to fix them.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppSideba: The application sidebar component rendering navigation menu items with active-state highlighting and a data reset dialog trigger.
frontend/src/components/layout/DataReset: A confirmation alert dialog that permanently deletes all active (Pending, Ready, Return from Hallmark) orders via a reset mutation.
frontend/src/components/masterdesigns/Ed: A modal dialog for reassigning a design code to an existing or new karigar, invalidating relevant query caches on save.
frontend/src/components/tagprinting/Webv: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend actor interactions including orders, design mappings, master data, and external blobs. Handles cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` wrappers around the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/AgeingStock.tsx: Page component that displays pending orders grouped by design code with color-coded age bands (green/yellow/red) based on order date. Supports bulk selection and marking orders as ready via a supplied-quantity dialog.
frontend/src/pages/BarcodeScanning.tsx: Page component supporting both hardware barcode scanner (keyboard event buffering) and camera-based QR scanning to collect order IDs and batch-update their status.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page with summary cards and a tabbed interface showing Total Orders, Ready, Hallmark, Customer Orders, and Karigars tabs, with loading skeletons while data fetches.
frontend/src/pages/DesignImages.tsx: Page component for uploading design images to the backend, supporting both folder selection and ZIP file extraction, with batch processing and progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/IngestOrders.tsx: Page component for uploading an Excel file of orders, parsing it with excelParser, and sequentially saving each order to the backend canister with error reporting.
frontend/src/pages/KarigarDetail.tsx: Page displaying pending orders for a specific karigar, with support for selecting orders, marking them as ready, and exporting them to JPEG, PDF, or Excel formats.
frontend/src/pages/MasterDesigns.tsx: Page for uploading and managing master design mappings from an Excel file, displaying a table of design-to-karigar mappings with editing capabilities.
frontend/src/pages/Reconciliation.tsx: Page for reconciling orders by parsing a master Excel file and comparing it against existing backend orders, with options to persist matched master data rows.
frontend/src/pages/TagPrinting.tsx: React page for tag printing that displays ready orders grouped by design code, supports date-range filtering, bulk selection, clipboard copy of order numbers, and a hallmark status update dialog.
frontend/src/pages/UnmappedCodes.tsx: React page listing orders with missing design mappings (generic name or karigar), allowing inline editing to update or reassign those mappings via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/utils/ageingBadge.tsx: Exports an AgeingBadge component that displays how many days old an order is with color-coded styling (green ≤14d, amber ≤29d, red 30d+), plus a getDaysAgo helper.
frontend/src/utils/excelParser.ts: Parses an Excel file using SheetJS loaded from CDN, mapping rows to ParsedOrder objects with normalized design codes, order types, and nanosecond timestamps.
frontend/src/utils/exportUtils.ts: Provides exportToExcel (SheetJS CDN, CSV fallback) and a pure-client-side buildPDFBytes function to export order arrays as .xlsx or per-order-page PDF files.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens (primary, gold, sidebar, chart), extended font families (Inter, Playfair Display), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the Jewellery OMS project state at version 3, listing pending feature requests (AR-1 through AR-5) including RB order logic restoration, karigar sync, PDF export fix, and sidebar layout fix, with a note to apply fixes one at a time due to deployment size constraints.
